expression.expression:
MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category IN ('home', 'lander')
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'products'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'product_detail'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'cart'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'shipping'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'billing'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'thankyou'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN sessions > 0
    THEN CAST(conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions AS DOUBLE)
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN sessions > 0
    THEN CAST(bounces AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions AS DOUBLE)
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN baseline_sessions > 0 AND sessions > 0
    THEN (
      (CAST(conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions AS DOUBLE))
      - (CAST(baseline_conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(baseline_sessions AS DOUBLE))
    )
    / (CAST(baseline_conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(baseline_sessions AS DOUBLE))
  ELSE NULL
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN baseline_sessions > 0
  AND sessions > 0
  AND (CAST(conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions AS DOUBLE)) > (CAST(baseline_conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(baseline_sessions AS DOUBLE))
    THEN 'positive'
  WHEN baseline_sessions > 0
  AND sessions > 0
  AND (CAST(conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions AS DOUBLE)) < (CAST(baseline_conversions AS DOUBLE) / CAST(baseline_sessions AS DOUBLE))
    THEN 'negative'
  ELSE 'neutral'
END AS STRING)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN pageview_count = 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category IN ('home', 'lander')
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'products'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'product_detail'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'cart'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'shipping'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'billing'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

MAX(CASE
  WHEN page_category = 'thankyou'
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CASE
  WHEN pageview_url = '/billing'
    THEN 'billing_v1'
  WHEN pageview_url = '/billing-2'
    THEN 'billing_v2'
  ELSE 'unknown'
END

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN (ordered_sessions * 1.0) / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN (bounced_sessions * 1.0) / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN total_gross_revenue / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN total_net_revenue / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CASE
  WHEN sessions > 0
    THEN (bounces * 1.0) / sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN sessions > 0
    THEN total_gross_revenue / sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN sessions > 0
    THEN total_net_revenue / sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END

condition.expression: billing_variant = '/billing-2' AND session_date >= overlap_start AND session_date <= overlap_end

expression.expression:
SUM(CASE
  WHEN pageview_count = 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN pageview_count = 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

-- Severity: normalized score 0-100 based on volume and underperformance
-- High bounce + low conversion + meaningful volume = high severity
LEAST(
  100.0, 
  (bounce_rate * 30.0)
  + (
      (
        1.0 - CASE
            WHEN sessions > 0
              THEN (conversions * 1.0) / sessions
            ELSE 0.0
          END
      )
      * 40.0
    )
  + (LEAST(sessions, 1000) / 1000.0 * 30.0))

CAST(CASE
  WHEN sessions_reaching_billing > 0
    THEN (orders_completed * 1.0) / sessions_reaching_billing
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN (conversions * 1.0) / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN (bounces * 1.0) / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CASE
  WHEN bounce_rate > 0.7 AND entity_type = 'entry_page'
    THEN 'Redesign landing page to improve engagement'
  WHEN bounce_rate > 0.7 AND entity_type = 'channel'
    THEN 'Review ad targeting and audience match'
  WHEN (conversions * 1.0 / NULLIF(sessions, 0)) < 0.01 AND sessions > 100
    THEN 'Investigate conversion blockers'
  WHEN revenue_per_session < 0.5 AND sessions > 100
    THEN 'Optimize for higher-value conversions'
  ELSE NULL
END

SUM(CASE
  WHEN pageview_count = 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN pageview_count = 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CASE
  WHEN entity_key = 'billing' AND sessions_entering > 0
    THEN CAST(sessions_continuing AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions_entering AS DOUBLE)
  ELSE NULL
END

LEAST(
  100.0, 
  CASE
    WHEN sessions_entering > 0
      THEN (CAST(sessions_dropped AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions_entering AS DOUBLE)) * 50.0
    ELSE 0.0
  END
  + (LEAST(CAST(sessions_dropped AS DOUBLE), 1000.0) / 1000.0 * 50.0))

CAST(CASE
  WHEN sessions_entering > 0
    THEN (CAST(sessions_continuing AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions_entering AS DOUBLE))
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN sessions_entering > 0
    THEN (CAST(sessions_dropped AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sessions_entering AS DOUBLE))
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN (ordered_sessions * 1.0) / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN (bounced_sessions * 1.0) / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN total_gross_revenue / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_sessions > 0
    THEN total_net_revenue / total_sessions
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN entity_key = 'products' AND sessions_dropped > sessions_continuing
    THEN 'Improve product page discovery and relevance'
  WHEN entity_key = 'product_detail' AND sessions_dropped > sessions_continuing
    THEN 'Enhance product detail page with better CTAs'
  WHEN entity_key = 'cart' AND sessions_dropped > sessions_continuing
    THEN 'Simplify cart experience and add urgency'
  WHEN entity_key = 'shipping' AND sessions_dropped > sessions_continuing
    THEN 'Review shipping costs and delivery options'
  WHEN entity_key = 'billing' AND checkout_completion_rate IS NOT NULL AND checkout_completion_rate < 0.5
    THEN 'Simplify checkout and payment options'
  ELSE NULL
END AS STRING)

condition.expression: billing_variant = '/billing' AND session_date >= overlap_start AND session_date <= overlap_end

    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)
